description: Reduce party size to a smaller value than previously attempted to meet venue capacity constraints.
success_criterion: Party size is updated to a smaller value than the previous proposal.

description: Search for venues that can accommodate the reduced party size.
success_criterion: Venue search returns at least one valid venue for the new party size.

description: Calculate the total cost for the selected venue and party size.
success_criterion: Cost calculation returns a valid amount for the selected venue.

description: Hand off the corrected booking data to the structured half for final processing.
success_criterion: Handoff_to_structured tool is successfully executed with adjusted party size and venue details.
